strap: East Midlands Transport draws £1.62bn of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,856 grants, anchored by Sheffield (22%), Nottingham (20%), with Croda Europe on the industrial side. 38 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £43m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" and "Coordinating instead of deciding" behaviour — multi-actor coordination distributes risk across institutional partners without forcing the strategic option-collapse that would convert capability into a defined pathway.
